title: Backports and release notes for v2.1.2

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mheon* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/v2.1/OWNERS)~~ [mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
@Luap99 I was on the fence as to whether that could be considered a feature/breaking change reserved to v2.2.0 - it's definitely a significant behaviour change (but we already have a few of those)
@mheon I'm fine with just including 343a10e this one is only a bug fix.
@Luap99 SGTM - I'll spin up a new PR once this merges so I don't have to restart the tests here again.

Ah, `build-each-commit` is failing because it takes substantially longer than the timeout there to rebase + build 70-odd commits.

I'll turn it off for this PR tomorrow, and include the extra commit @Luap99 mentioned.
